albums_artwork_overlay.description: Show a text overlay on artwork thumbnails in the Albums view.

albums_show_index.description: Show the row index column in the albums view.

albums_show_love.description: Show the loved/heart column in the albums view.

albums_show_plays.description: Show the play count column in the albums view.

albums_show_select.description: Show the multi-select checkbox column in the albums view.

albums_show_songcount.description: Show the song count column in the albums view.

albums_show_stars.description: Show the star rating column in the albums view.

albums_show_thumbnail.description: Show the thumbnail column in the albums view.

artists_artwork_overlay.description: Show a text overlay on artwork thumbnails in the Artists view.

artists_show_albumcount.description: Show the album count column in the artists view.

artists_show_index.description: Show the row index column in the artists view.

artists_show_love.description: Show the loved/heart column in the artists view.

artists_show_plays.description: Show the play count column in the artists view.

artists_show_select.description: Show the multi-select checkbox column in the artists view.

artists_show_songcount.description: Show the song count column in the artists view.

artists_show_stars.description: Show the star rating column in the artists view.

artists_show_thumbnail.description: Show the thumbnail column in the artists view.

artwork_column_mode.description: Visibility and sizing of the large artwork panel shown alongside list views. Options: `auto` (size derived from window width; auto-hides when the slot list would have less than 800px), `always_native` (user-defined width; image stays square and letterboxed vertically), `always_stretched` (user-defined width; image fills the column non-square per `artwork_column_stretch_fit`), `never` (column hidden everywhere).

artwork_column_stretch_fit.description: Fit mode used when `artwork_column_mode = "always_stretched"`. Options: `cover` (preserve aspect ratio, crop to fill), `fill` (true stretch — distorts album art). Ignored in other modes.

artwork_column_width_pct.description: Artwork column width as a fraction of the window width (0.05 to 0.80). Only consulted in `always_native` and `always_stretched` modes.

artwork_resolution.description: Quality for large panel artwork. Options: `default` (1000px), `high` (1500px), `ultra` (2000px), `original`.

auto_follow_playing.description: The Queue view auto-scrolls to keep the currently playing track visible as it changes.

close_to_tray.description: When `show_tray_icon` is on, the window's close button hides Nokkvi into the tray instead of quitting. Ignored when the tray icon is disabled.

crossfade_duration_secs.description: Duration of the crossfade in seconds (1 to 12).

custom_eq_presets.description: User-saved EQ presets. Each preset is a `{ name, gains }` object; managed through the in-app EQ panel.

enter_behavior.description: Action when pressing `Enter` on a song. Options: `play_all` (replace queue with the current view), `play_single` (replace queue with just this track), `append_and_play` (add to queue and play).

eq_gains.description: List of 10 gain values in dB (one per band: 32, 64, 125, 250, 500, 1k, 2k, 4k, 8k, 16k Hz). Range −12.0 to +12.0 per band.

font_family.description: Font family override. Leave empty to use system default sans-serif.

genres_show_albumcount.description: Show the album count column in the genres view.

genres_show_index.description: Show the row index column in the genres view.

genres_show_select.description: Show the multi-select checkbox column in the genres view.

genres_show_songcount.description: Show the song count column in the genres view.

genres_show_thumbnail.description: Show the thumbnail column in the genres view.

horizontal_volume.description: Stack volume sliders horizontally instead of vertically in the player bar.

library_page_size.description: How many items to fetch per request. Options: `small` (100), `default` (500), `large` (1000), `massive` (5000).

light_mode.description: Use the light variant of the active theme.

local_music_path.description: Absolute path to your local music library. If set, Nokkvi will try to open files directly (for things like "Show in File Manager").

nav_layout.description: Placement of view tabs. Options: `top` (horizontal bar), `side` (vertical sidebar), `none` (hidden — only the active view and player bar render).

normalization_level.description: Target loudness. Options: `quiet` (-23 LUFS), `normal` (-14 LUFS), `loud` (-9 LUFS).

opacity_gradient.description: Apply a subtle opacity fade to items that are not in the center of the list.

playlists_artwork_overlay.description: Show a text overlay on artwork thumbnails in the Playlists view.

playlists_show_duration.description: Show the total duration column in the playlists view.

playlists_show_index.description: Show the row index column in the playlists view.

playlists_show_select.description: Show the multi-select checkbox column in the playlists view.

playlists_show_songcount.description: Show the song count column in the playlists view.

playlists_show_thumbnail.description: Show the thumbnail column in the playlists view.

playlists_show_updatedat.description: Show the last updated column in the playlists view.

queue_show_album.description: Show the album column in the queue.

queue_show_default_playlist.description: Show a chip in the Queue view's header for the remembered default playlist (the one used by `quick_add_to_playlist`).

queue_show_duration.description: Show the duration column in the queue.

queue_show_genre.description: Show the genre column in the queue.

queue_show_index.description: Show the row index column in the queue.

queue_show_love.description: Show the loved/heart column in the queue.

queue_show_plays.description: Show the play count column in the queue.

queue_show_select.description: Show the multi-select checkbox column in the queue.

queue_show_stars.description: Show the star rating column in the queue.

queue_show_thumbnail.description: Show the thumbnail column in the queue.

quick_add_to_playlist.description: Skip the "Add to Playlist" dialog and add directly to a remembered default playlist.

replay_gain_fallback_db.description: dB applied to tracks with no ReplayGain tags. Range -15 to +15. Ignored when `replay_gain_fallback_to_agc` is `true`.

replay_gain_fallback_to_agc.description: Untagged tracks fall through to real-time AGC instead of using `replay_gain_fallback_db`.

replay_gain_preamp_db.description: Pre-amp dB applied on top of the resolved ReplayGain value. Range -15 to +15. Typical: `0` (reference), `+6` (modern-loudness target).

replay_gain_prevent_clipping.description: Clamp the resolved gain so `track_peak × gain ≤ 1.0` using the per-track peak tag.

rounded_mode.description: Apply rounded corners to all UI elements.

scrobble_threshold.description: Percentage of track duration (0.25 to 0.90) needed to trigger a scrobble.

scrobbling_enabled.description: Report listening activity back to the server.

server_url.description: The full URL of your Navidrome server (e.g., `https://music.example.com`).

sfx_volume.description: Volume for UI sound effects (0.0 to 1.0).

show_album_artists_only.description: If true, the Artists view shows only album artists and excludes track-level featured artists.

show_tray_icon.description: Register a StatusNotifierItem tray icon on the session bus. When off, no tray icon is shown.

similar_show_album.description: Show the album column in the similar songs view.

similar_show_duration.description: Show the duration column in the similar songs view.

similar_show_index.description: Show the row index column in the similar songs view (Find Similar / Top Songs results).

similar_show_love.description: Show the loved/heart column in the similar songs view.

similar_show_select.description: Show the multi-select checkbox column in the similar songs view.

similar_show_thumbnail.description: Show the thumbnail column in the similar songs view.

slot_text_links.description: Make artist and album names inside list rows clickable links to their respective views.

songs_artwork_overlay.description: Show a text overlay on artwork thumbnails in the Songs view.

songs_show_album.description: Show the album column in the songs view.

songs_show_duration.description: Show the duration column in the songs view.

songs_show_genre.description: Show the genre column in the songs view.

songs_show_index.description: Show the row index column in the songs view.

songs_show_love.description: Show the loved/heart column in the songs view.

songs_show_plays.description: Show the play count column in the songs view.

songs_show_select.description: Show the multi-select checkbox column in the songs view.

songs_show_stars.description: Show the star rating column in the songs view.

songs_show_thumbnail.description: Show the thumbnail column in the songs view.

sound_effects_enabled.description: Global toggle for UI sound effects.

stable_viewport.description: Clicking an item highlights it in place; the list does not auto-scroll on playback changes.

start_view.description: The view to show on startup. Options: `Queue`, `Albums`, `Artists`, `Songs`, `Genres`, `Playlists`, `Radios`.

strip_merged_mode.description: Apply strip patterns to the merged artist/album display string rather than individual fields.

strip_separator.description: Character used to join visible fields in the metadata strip. Options: `dot` (·), `bullet` (•), `pipe` (|), `em_dash` (—), `slash` (/), `bar` (│).

strip_show_album.description: Show the album name in the metadata strip.

strip_show_artist.description: Show the artist name in the metadata strip.

strip_show_format_info.description: Show technical info (codec/sample rate) in the strip.

strip_show_labels.description: Show the field labels (`title:` / `artist:` / `album:`) before each value in the metadata strip.

strip_show_title.description: Show the song title in the metadata strip.

suppress_library_refresh_toasts.description: Hide the toast notification that appears when Navidrome reports a library refresh.

track_info_display.description: Placement of the metadata strip. Options: `off`, `player_bar`, `top_bar`, `progress_track`.

verbose_config.description: If true, all settings (even defaults) are written to the TOML file.

visualization_mode.description: Active visualizer mode. Options: `off`, `bars`, `lines`. Cycle live with the `V` hotkey — see [Visualizer Reference](/reference/visualizer/).

visualizer.auto_sensitivity.description: Automatically scale gain to fill the available height.

visualizer.bars.bar_depth_3d.description: 3D isometric depth in pixels (0.0 disables; up to 20.0).

visualizer.bars.bar_width_max.description: Maximum bar width in pixels for large windows. Must be ≥ `bar_width_min` (up to 20.0). Equal min/max gives uniform bar widths regardless of window size.

visualizer.bars.bar_width_min.description: Minimum bar width in pixels for small windows (1.0 to 10.0).

visualizer.bars.border_width.description: Border thickness in pixels. Also controls LED segment gaps when `led_bars` is on (0.0 to 5.0).

visualizer.bars.led_bars.description: Render bars as discrete LED segments (VU meter style).

visualizer.bars.led_segment_height.description: Height of each LED segment in pixels (LED mode only; 2.0 to 20.0).

visualizer.bars.max_bars.description: Maximum number of bars the dynamic layout will try to fit (16 to 2048).

visualizer.bars.peak_fade_time.description: Fade-out duration in milliseconds (`fade` and `fall_fade` modes only).

visualizer.bars.peak_fall_speed.description: Peak fall velocity scale (1 = slow, 5 = default, 20 = fast; does not affect `fade` mode).

visualizer.bars.peak_height_ratio.description: Peak indicator height as a percentage of bar width (10 to 100; ignored in LED mode).

visualizer.bars.peak_hold_time.description: Duration in milliseconds peaks stay at maximum before falling/fading.

visualizer.height_percent.description: Percentage of window height occupied by the visualizer (0.1 to 0.6).

visualizer.higher_cutoff_freq.description: Treble ceiling in Hz. Capped at the Nyquist limit (22050).

visualizer.lines.animation_speed.description: Color cycle speed for the `breathing` gradient mode (0.05 = very slow, 1.0 = very fast).

visualizer.lines.boat.description: Render a small boat sprite that rides the waveform.

visualizer.lines.fill_opacity.description: Transparency of the area under the line (0.0 to 1.0).

visualizer.lines.line_thickness.description: Thickness of the line as a fraction of visualizer height (0.01 to 0.10).

visualizer.lines.outline_thickness.description: Outline border thickness in pixels (0.0 disables; up to 5.0).

visualizer.lines.point_count.description: Number of points used to draw the line (8 to 512).

visualizer.lower_cutoff_freq.description: Bass floor in Hz. Frequencies below this are excluded from the spectrum (minimum `20`).

visualizer.monstercat.description: Monstercat-style energy spread to neighbouring bars. Values below `0.7` snap to `0.0` (disabled); effective range is `0.7` to `1.0`.

visualizer.noise_reduction.description: Smoothing of the raw FFT data (0.0 to 1.0).

visualizer.waves_smoothing.description: Spline control-point density when `waves` is on (2 to 16; higher = smoother curves).
